## Checklist

### General

- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff
- [ ] No console.logs / debug code left
- [ ] No hardcoded values / secrets

### Frontend

- [ ] Works on mobile + desktop
- [ ] Dark & light theme checked
- [ ] No layout breaks on different screen sizes

### Backend

- [ ] Endpoints documented (Swagger / README)
- [ ] Error handling covered
- [ ] No N+1 queries

### Tests & quality

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Linter passes (`npm run lint` / equivalent)
- [ ] Build passes locally

### AI review

- [ ] AI review completed (CodeRabbit / Copilot)
- [ ] Critical AI comments addressed or explicitly dismissed with reasoning
